title: RNAylomeSeq data analysis from "A viral ADP-ribosyltransferase attaches RNA chains to host proteins"
author: Wolfram-Schauerte, Maik
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Here, we present the code used to analyse the RNAylomeSeq data presented in Wolfram-Schauerte et al., 2023 "A viral ADP-ribosyltransferase attaches RNA chains to host proteins". We include the RMarkdown script and its HTML used for the analysis of the count data, the corresponding count data and genome annotation files.
steps_raw: Here, we present the code used to analyse the RNAylomeSeq data presented in Wolfram-Schauerte et al., 2023 "A viral ADP-ribosyltransferase attaches RNA chains to host proteins". We include the RMarkdown script and its HTML used for the analysis of the count data, the corresponding count data and genome annotation files.
